text:
Mo is the applicant. ‘Applicant’ is what the law calls the person who applies to court to end a marriage or civil partnership. Pat is the Respondent. ‘Respondent’ is what the law calls the person who has to respond to the applicant’s application.

If Mo and Pat agreed to apply together they would be known as ‘joint applicants’ – Mo would be applicant 1 and Pat would be applicant 2.

### START
